flashcards.definition: Planet orbiting a star other than our Sun; over 5,500 confirmed (as of 2024).
Detecting exoplanets by measuring the slight dimming of a star as a planet crosses in front.
Detecting exoplanets by measuring the Doppler shift in a star's spectrum caused by gravitational wobble.
Ultracool dwarf star with 7 Earth-sized planets; 3 in the habitable zone; prime JWST target.
NASA mission (2009–2018) that discovered thousands of exoplanets using the transit method.
